news.paragraph: Silver (SLV) is currently trading around $66.90, with recent headlines focusing on broader market movements and macroeconomic factors. News highlights include fluctuating Treasury yields, inflation concerns, and geopolitical uncertainty surrounding Iran deal prospects, which are impacting exchange-traded funds and US equities. While there are no specific catalysts for SLV mentioned, traders should consider how these macroeconomic trends and geopolitical events might influence silver prices.
